role: IRGC Clergy Affairs Head, East Azerbaijan Province (d. 12 March 2026)
bio: Naqi Mohaddesnia served as head of Clergy Affairs for the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) in East Azerbaijan Province. He was a clerical commissar figure within the IRGC — part of the ideological-political officer corps responsible for religious oversight and indoctrination. He was killed on 12 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).

sources.title: IRGC Clergy Affairs Officer Killed in East Azerbaijan

editorial_notes: Killed 12 March 2026. Clerical commissar role within IRGC provincial structure.
